title: Ellie and the Tiny Lost Duck
subtitle: A silly meadow adventure with a surprise hiding spot.

sticker.label: Ducky Friend
sticker.description: You helped Ellie find her tiny friend!

coverIllustrationDescription: Ellie the elephant and a tiny yellow duckling stand together in a sunny green meadow dotted with wildflowers. Ellie smiles warmly. The duckling peeps happily at her feet.

pages.illustrationDescription: Sunny green meadow with rolling hills. Ellie, a gentle gray elephant with big kind eyes, lifts her head and listens. Wildflowers sway. A tiny distant 'peep' floats on the breeze.
A tiny fluffy yellow duckling sits alone near a puddle, looking small and worried. Ellie kneels down, trunk curled with care. Soft afternoon light. The meadow feels big and quiet.
Ellie searches the meadow — peeking behind bushes and tall grass. Butterflies flutter. The duckling is nowhere in sight. Ellie looks puzzled but hopeful.
Funny reveal — the tiny duckling pops out of Ellie's trunk with a splash of water! Ellie looks surprised with wide eyes. The duck wears a droplet as a hat. Both look silly and delighted.
Ellie and the duckling walk side by side into the golden sunset, trunk and wing almost touching. Heart shapes in the clouds. Fireflies begin to twinkle. Pure joy.
